title: Documented standalone leaderboard SQL recreates a SECURITY DEFINER aggregate RPC callable through the default PUBLIC execute grant

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: Backend setup docs list `supabase/get_leaderboard.sql` as a deployment/setup artifact after schema and migrations.

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: Creates `get_leaderboard(period text default 'all')` as SECURITY DEFINER with no fail-closed `auth.uid()` check.

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: Reads cross-user completion aggregates and profile display rows.

affected_locations.label: closest_control
affected_locations.detail: Missing revoke of default PUBLIC execute grant.
